<script>const styles = `
  .card-body {
    background: black !important;
  }
  .card-footer {
    border-top: 2px solid white;
    padding: 16px;
    background: black;
  }
`;

const styleSheet = document.createElement('style');
styleSheet.type = 'text/css';
styleSheet.innerText = styles;
document.head.appendChild(styleSheet);

</script>

<style> 
.card-body {
background:black!important;
}
.card-footer {
    border-top: 2px solid white;
    padding: 16px;
    background: black!important;
}
</style>
